value.claim: He is generally socially blind / obtuse
value.correct_statement: He reads plain surface emotion accurately, better than fine; his deficit is specific to coded/encoded meaning only

value.claim: He is blind to evident interest, effort, or feeling
value.correct_statement: He reads evident interest, effort, and feeling correctly; he misses only the layer where real meaning is hidden under a safe one
Writing him as blind to evident interest/effort/feeling is explicitly wrong; he is not the stock awkward-genius

value.claim: His failure to decode is coldness or stupidity
value.correct_statement: It is neither coldness nor stupidity; he answers the literal proposition helpfully by the only logic he trusts and never hears the cipher
He can read her when he remembers to keep the instrument aimed; the tragedy is that forgetting to is indistinguishable from indifference

facts.value: Coded-channel blindness — misses meaning that is encoded under a deniable surface (a bid routed through a proxy); receives only the literal vessel, never the smuggled message
Reads plain surface emotion accurately, better than average; correctly reads evident interest, effort, and feeling when his attention is aimed

negations.claim: He is generally socially blind / obtuse
negations.correct_statement: He reads plain surface emotion accurately, better than fine; his deficit is specific to coded/encoded meaning only
